final_prompt.prompt:
Create a futuristic architectural concept illustration.

Style/medium: needs a "未来主义" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Zaha Hadid fluid architecture movement, Syd Mead sci-fi industrial design heritage, contemporary parametric architecture visualization; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a streamlined white building suspended in mid-air, drones, holographic projections, and clean energy facilities
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a sustainable urban future atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must embody a sustainable urban development vision
Avoid:
